SiaDatabase.title: SIA Database State
SiaDatabase.description: Entire unified database configuration and stock level state for a given workspace

database.description: Mapping from desk ID to equipment definition properties

areas.description: List of office/puesto areas and colors

licenses.description: List of software packages and limit counters

inventoryItems.description: List of active hardware inventory items, stock levels, and remarks

auditLogs.description: Audit trails listing logged actions, timestamps, and usernames

/sia_databases/{databaseId}.description: Active real-time synchronisation store for workspaces
